shopify_wyg_0: Daashboodh dakhli iyo tirinta dalabaadka oo waqtiga dhabta ah
shopify_wyg_1: Waxqabadka badeecada: dakhli, xabbado, heerka celinta SKU kasta
shopify_wyg_2: Falanqaynta macaamiisha: cusub iyo kuwa soo noqnoqda, LTV, heerka soo-noqoshada
shopify_wyg_3: Digniinaha kaydka: kayd hooseeya iyo aqoonsiga kayd xad-dhaaf ah
shopify_wyg_5: Warbixin maalinle oo leh xogtaada Shopify ee muhiimka ah
shopify_step_0: Guji "Ku dar isku-xir" oo dooro Shopify
shopify_step_2: Ogolow AskBiz shaashadda ruqsadaha app-ka Shopify
shopify_step_3: Xogtaadu si toos ah bay isku dhigmaysaa — natiijooyinka ugu horreeya ka yar 2 daqiiqo
amazon_wyg_0: Iib ku salaysan ASIN, qayb, iyo suuq
amazon_wyg_1: Xayaysiinta Amazon: kharash, ACOS, ROAS ololihii kasta
amazon_wyg_2: Heerarka kaydka FBA iyo digniinaha dib-u-buuxinta
amazon_wyg_3: Raad-raaca darajada iibka ugu badan ee ASIN-nada muhiimka ah
amazon_step_0: Ka dooro Amazon Seller Central liiska isku-xirka
amazon_step_1: Gal Seller Central oo ogolow gelitaanka AskBiz
amazon_step_2: Dooro suuqyada la isku dhigayo (UK, US, EU, iwm.)
amazon_step_3: Xogtu maalin walba bay isku dhigmaysaa — xogta xayaysiinta 12 saac kasta bay cusboonaanaysaa
xero_wyg_0: Kooban P&L maalinle: dakhli, faa'iidada guud, faa'iidada saafiga ah
xero_wyg_1: Xaaladda lacagta iyo saadaasha socodka lacagta 30/60/90-maalmood
xero_wyg_2: Biilal dib u dhacay iyo warbixin da'da deynta
xero_wyg_3: Faa'iidada guud badeeco ama xariiq adeeg kasta
xero_wyg_4: Raad-raaca kharashaadka iyo digniinaha isbeddelka kharashka
xero_step_1: Gal akoonkaaga Xero oo ogolow AskBiz
xero_step_2: Dooro ururka Xero ee la isku xirayo
xero_step_3: Xogtaada maaliyadeed habeenkii bay isku dhigmaysaa — P&L subaxda xigta ayaad arki doontaa
stripe_wyg_0: MRR iyo ARR laga xisaabiyay rukumaadkaaga firfircoon
stripe_wyg_1: Heerka luminta: luminta macmiil iyo luminta dakhli
stripe_wyg_2: MRR ballaadhin ka timid kor-u-qaadis iyo kuraas dheeraad ah
stripe_wyg_3: Heerka lacag-bixin fashilantay iyo heerka soo-kabashada
stripe_wyg_4: Baaxadda lacag-bixinta badeeco iyo qorshe kasta
stripe_step_2: AskBiz wuxuu soo dejinayaa taariikhda rukunkaaga iyo lacag-bixintaada
stripe_step_3: Cabbirrada isla markiiba baa la xisaabiyaa — MRR daqiiqado gudahood ayaad arki doontaa
meta_ads_wyg_0: Kharashka xayaysiinta, muujin, gujimo, iyo beddelaad ololihii kasta
meta_ads_wyg_1: ROAS iyo CPA ololihii iyo koox xayaysiin kasta
meta_ads_wyg_3: Digniinaha socodka miisaaniyadda — ogow marka ololayaashu wax-badan ama wax-yar ku bixiyaan
meta_ads_step_0: Ka dooro Meta Ads liiska isku-xirka
meta_ads_step_2: Dooro akoonnada xayaysiinta la isku dhigayo
meta_ads_step_3: Xogtu 6 saac kasta bay isku dhigmaysaa — waxqabadkii shalay subax kasta ayaad arki doontaa
google_ads_wyg_0: Kharash, muujin, gujimo, iyo beddelaad ololihii kasta
google_ads_wyg_1: ROAS iyo CPA ololihii iyo eray-fure kasta
google_ads_wyg_2: Raad-raaca Dhibcaha Tayada ee eray-furayaasha muhiimka ah
google_ads_wyg_3: Qaybta muujinta raadinta iyo qaybta muujinta la waayay
google_ads_step_0: Ka dooro Google Ads liiska isku-xirka
google_ads_step_2: Dooro akoonka Google Ads ee la isku xirayo
google_ads_step_3: Xogtu maalin walba bay isku dhigmaysaa — waxqabadka ololaha subax kasta ayaad arki doontaa
woocommerce_wyg_1: Waxqabadka badeecada: iib, celin, iyo faa'iido SKU kasta
woocommerce_wyg_2: Falanqaynta macaamiisha: cusub iyo kuwa soo noqnoqda, AOV, LTV
woocommerce_wyg_4: Heerka celinta iyo soo-celinta badeeco kasta
woocommerce_wyg_5: Warbixin maalinle oo leh xogtaada WooCommerce ee muhiimka ah
woocommerce_step_2: Samee fure API ah oo WooCommerce REST ah oo ku geli AskBiz
woocommerce_step_3: Xogtu isla markiiba bay isku dhigmaysaa
quickbooks_wyg_0: Kooban dakhli iyo kharash: usbuucan, bishan, sannadkan
quickbooks_wyg_1: Biilal aan la bixin oo macmiil iyo da' ahaan la kala saaray
quickbooks_wyg_2: Saadaasha socodka lacagta oo ku saleysan deyn-qaadayaal iyo deyn-bixiyeyaal
quickbooks_wyg_3: Faa'iido iyo khasaare oo fasal ama goob ahaan
quickbooks_wyg_4: Kala-firdhinta qaybaha kharashka iyo digniinaha isbeddelka
quickbooks_step_0: Ka dooro QuickBooks Online liiska isku-xirka
quickbooks_step_2: Ogolow AskBiz inuu akhriyo xogtaada QuickBooks
quickbooks_step_3: Xogta maaliyadeed maalin walba bay isku dhigmaysaa laga bilaabo halkaas
